engineIntelligence.h2: Suzuki Solio Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Suzuki Solio in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: Suzuki Solio K12B engine - petrol 1.2L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear - causes rattle on cold start, typically after 80k miles.
Carbon buildup on intake valves - affects Dualjet variants, reduces performance over time.

cards.altText: Suzuki Solio K12C engine - petrol hybrid 1.2L replacement UK
knownFailures: Dualjet injector clogging - carbon deposits affect twin injectors, causes misfires.
ISG motor integration faults - SHVS system errors require specialist diagnostics.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £1,150-£1,850 (supply only) Estimated from comparable K12C units - actual quotes may vary.

cards.altText: Suzuki Solio D13A engine - diesel 1.3L replacement UK
knownFailures: EGR valve clogging - causes power loss and rough idle on high-mileage units.
Turbo actuator wear - common after 100k miles, leads to reduced boost pressure.
cards.replacementCost: Typical UK rebuilt engine: £975-£1,650 (supply only) Estimated from comparable D13A units - actual quotes may vary.

engineGuide.h2: Suzuki Solio Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Suzuki Solio across all UK generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 1.2L Petrol
entries.history: The K12B replaced older 1.0L/1.3L units in 2011, bringing lightweight aluminium construction and improved fuel economy to the Solio range.
compatibleVariants: Solio G, Solio X, Solio Hybrid (non-SHVS), Solio Bandit (early), Mitsubishi Delica D:2
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner wear causing cold-start rattle (typically 70k-100k miles)
Carbon buildup on intake valves affecting Dualjet variants
Oil consumption increase due to piston ring wear on high-mileage units
entries.cta: Get quotes for K12B Suzuki Solio engine replacement

entries.title: 1.2L Petrol Hybrid (Dualjet SHVS)
entries.history: Introduced in 2015, the K12C added Dualjet twin-injector technology and SHVS mild hybrid assist, improving efficiency without plug-in complexity.
commonFailures: Dualjet injector clogging causing misfires and power loss (60k-90k miles)
ISG motor sensor faults triggering SHVS warning lights
12V auxiliary battery degradation disabling hybrid functions
entries.cta: Get quotes for K12C Suzuki Solio engine replacement

entries.title: 1.2L Three-Cylinder Petrol Hybrid
entries.history: The latest Z12E three-cylinder engine, introduced in the 2025 Solio facelift, represents Suzuki's newest efficiency-focused powertrain with SHVS technology.
commonFailures: Early production unit - limited failure data currently available
Monitor for typical three-cylinder NVH characteristics at high mileage
entries.cta: Get quotes for Z12E Suzuki Solio engine replacement

entries.title: 1.0L Petrol (Early Model)
entries.history: The compact K10A powered the earliest first-generation Solio and Wagon R+ models, offering simple, economical transport for urban use.
compatibleVariants: Early Solio/Wagon R+ MA63S (1999-2004), Japanese import variants
commonFailures: Timing belt wear if service intervals missed (interference engine)
Carbon buildup on intake valves at high mileage
entries.cta: Get quotes for K10A Suzuki Solio engine replacement

entries.title: 1.3L Petrol (Early Model)
entries.history: The larger M13A offered more torque than the 1.0L/1.2L options in early Solio models, appealing to owners seeking extra pulling power.
commonFailures: Timing chain guide wear causing noise at high mileage
Thermostat housing leaks on older examples
entries.cta: Get quotes for M13A Suzuki Solio engine replacement

entries.title: 1.3L Diesel
entries.history: The D13A turbo diesel powered European-spec Solio and Wagon R+ models in the early 2000s, offering strong economy and torque for commercial and import use.
compatibleVariants: Solio/Delio Wagon R+ MA63S European spec (2000-2004)
commonFailures: EGR valve clogging causing power loss and rough idle (80k-120k miles)
Turbo actuator wear reducing boost pressure at high mileage
DPF regeneration issues on later European-spec units
entries.cta: Get quotes for D13A Suzuki Solio engine replacement

commonProblems.h2: Suzuki Solio Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Suzuki Solio's K12B, K12C and D13A engines are generally reliable, but UK owners report timing chain tensioner wear, Dualjet injector clogging and EGR faults as the most common failure points driving replacement enquiries. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Use the cost comparisons below to decide whether repair or replacement offers better value for your Solio.

problems.h4: Timing Chain Tensioner Failure - Why K12B/K12C Solio Engines Rattle on Cold Start
problems.affectedModels: Suzuki Solio G, X, Hybrid, Bandit (MA15S/MA26S, 2011-2020, K12B & K12C)
problems.rootCause: Hydraulic tensioner loses pressure over time, allowing chain slack that causes rattling noise and potential jump.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace tensioner, guides, inspect chain wear
repairOptions.longevity: Viable only if caught early before chain stretch; 30-50k mile extension

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: New chain, tensioner, guides, seals, labour
repairOptions.longevity: Restores factory spec; recommended if chain has visible wear

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt K12B/K12C with upgraded tensioner
repairOptions.longevity: Most cost-effective if engine has other wear; 12-month warranty included

problems.recommendation: If your Solio has under 80k miles and the rattle is just starting, a preventative tensioner replacement from a specialist offers the best value. However, if the chain has already jumped or the engine has high mileage, a rebuilt unit is often cheaper than a full top-end rebuild and comes with warranty protection.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt K12B/K12C engine prices for your Suzuki Solio

problems.h4: Dualjet Injector Clogging - Why K12C Solio Engines Misfire or Lose Power
problems.affectedModels: Suzuki Solio Hybrid, Bandit Hybrid (MA26S/MA27S, 2015-present, K12C-A/B)
problems.rootCause: Carbon deposits build up on the twin injectors per cylinder, disrupting fuel spray pattern and causing uneven combustion.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Ultrasonic clean, flow test, reinstall injectors
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; may need repeating every 20k miles

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace all four twin injectors, ECU adaptation
repairOptions.longevity: Restores performance; use OEM or high-quality aftermarket

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt K12C with upgraded injectors
repairOptions.longevity: Best value if engine has other wear; includes SHVS system check

problems.recommendation: Start with a professional injector cleaning if symptoms are mild. If misfires persist or the Solio has over 80k miles, replacing the injectors or opting for a rebuilt engine with upgraded components is more economical long-term.
problems.cta: Get quotes for K12C Dualjet engine replacement for your Suzuki Solio

problems.h4: EGR Valve Clogging - Why D13A Diesel Solio Engines Lose Power
problems.affectedModels: Suzuki Solio/Delio Wagon R+ European spec (MA63S, 2000-2004, D13A)
problems.rootCause: Exhaust gas recirculation valve accumulates carbon deposits, restricting flow and causing poor idle, power loss and increased emissions.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove, clean valve or fit blanking plate, reset ECU
repairOptions.longevity: Cost-effective short-term; may affect emissions compliance

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Fit new or reconditioned EGR valve, gaskets, adapt
repairOptions.longevity: Restores factory function; use quality replacement part

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt D13A with upgraded turbo/EGR components
repairOptions.longevity: Most reliable long-term solution for high-mileage diesel Solios

problems.recommendation: For early D13A Solios, EGR cleaning or blanking is a budget fix, but confirm MOT emissions compliance first. If the turbo or injector pump also shows wear, a rebuilt engine offers better value and warranty protection.
problems.cta: Compare D13A diesel engine prices for your Suzuki Solio

problems.h4: SHVS Hybrid System Faults - Why K12C Solio Warning Lights Appear
problems.affectedModels: Suzuki Solio Hybrid, Bandit Hybrid (MA26S/MA27S, 2015-present, K12C SHVS)
problems.rootCause: 12V auxiliary battery degradation, ISG motor sensor faults, or hybrid ECU communication errors trigger warning lights and disable hybrid assist.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace auxiliary battery, reset hybrid system codes
repairOptions.longevity: Quick fix if battery is the sole cause; test ISG first

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Diagnose and replace ISG motor, sensors or wiring
repairOptions.longevity: Requires hybrid-specialist tools; confirm fault code first

repairOptions.tier: Full Replacement - Rebuilt K12C Hybrid Engine
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt K12C with SHVS system calibration
repairOptions.longevity: Most comprehensive solution; includes battery health check

problems.recommendation: Always start with a proper hybrid diagnostic scan. If the fault is isolated to the 12V battery, replacement is inexpensive. For ISG or ECU faults, compare specialist repair quotes against a rebuilt engine with full SHVS calibration included.
problems.cta: Enquire about K12C SHVS hybrid engine replacement for your Suzuki Solio

problems.h4: Oil Consumption & Piston Ring Wear - Why K12B Solio Engines Burn Oil
problems.affectedModels: Suzuki Solio G, X, Hybrid (MA15S, 2011-2015, K12B)
problems.rootCause: Piston ring wear or PCV valve failure allows oil to enter combustion chamber, causing blue smoke and increased top-ups.

repairOptions.tier: Minor - PCV Valve + Oil Seal Replacement
repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace PCV valve, valve cover gasket, refresh seals
repairOptions.longevity: Cost-effective if consumption is mild and recent

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Strip engine, replace rings, hone cylinders, reassemble
repairOptions.longevity: Labour-intensive; only viable if block is in good condition

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply & fit rebuilt K12B with upgraded rings and PCV system
repairOptions.longevity: Often cheaper than intermediate repair; includes full warranty

problems.recommendation: If oil consumption is moderate and the Solio has under 100k miles, try PCV replacement first. For heavy consumption or high mileage, a rebuilt engine is typically more economical than a ring job and comes with warranty coverage.
problems.cta: Get quotes for K12B engine replacement for your Suzuki Solio

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Suzuki Solio
finalCta.paragraph: The problems above represent the most common failure patterns reported by UK Suzuki Solio owners. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK specialists who understand Solio engines, hybrid systems and Japanese import compliance. Every rebuilt engine includes upgraded components addressing the original failure point, bench testing, and a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty. Compare quotes today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Suzuki Solio Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Suzuki Solio and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineTypes.h2: Suzuki Solio Engine Types - Options, Costs & What to Expect
engineTypes.intro: Every engine type below is available through our UK network with typical price ranges based on your Solio variant, engine code and budget.

types.title: Suzuki Solio Reconditioned Engines (Recon)
types.description: Professionally cleaned, inspected and resealed engines with worn components replaced to restore reliable performance for your Solio.
types.frontDescription: Professionally cleaned, inspected and resealed engines with worn components replaced to restore reliable performance for your Solio.
types.frontDisclaimer: Prices vary by engine code, mileage and supplier location.
types.backDescription: Reconditioned Solio engines undergo thorough cleaning, inspection and resealing. Worn components like gaskets, seals and bearings are replaced. Ideal for budget-conscious owners seeking reliable performance without full rebuild costs.
backBullets: Best for: K12B, D13A engines under 100k miles
types.cta: Compare reconditioned Suzuki Solio engine prices

types.title: Suzuki Solio Rebuilt Engines
types.description: Fully disassembled engines with all worn parts replaced, machined to spec and bench-tested for maximum reliability and longevity.
types.frontDescription: Fully disassembled engines with all worn parts replaced, machined to spec and bench-tested for maximum reliability and longevity.
types.frontDisclaimer: Hybrid K12C units may cost more due to SHVS calibration requirements.
types.backDescription: Rebuilt Solio engines are stripped to the block, machined, and fitted with new pistons, rings, bearings and gaskets. Bench-tested before dispatch. The most reliable option for high-mileage or failed engines.
backBullets: Upgraded components address known failure points
Best for: K12B, K12C, D13A engines with significant wear
types.cta: Get rebuilt Suzuki Solio engine quotes

types.title: Suzuki Solio Used Engines
types.description: Low-mileage engines sourced from UK breakers and Japanese imports, tested and ready to fit for budget-conscious Solio owners.
types.frontDescription: Low-mileage engines sourced from UK breakers and Japanese imports, tested and ready to fit for budget-conscious Solio owners.
types.frontDisclaimer: Mileage, condition and warranty vary by supplier - verify before purchase.
types.backDescription: Used Solio engines offer the lowest upfront cost. Sourced from written-off or parted-out vehicles, they're compression-tested and include basic warranty. Ideal for older Solios or tight budgets.
backBullets: Best for: Early MA15S models, non-hybrid variants
types.cta: Check used Suzuki Solio engine availability

types.title: Suzuki Solio Remanufactured Engines
types.description: Factory-spec rebuilds using OEM parts and processes, delivering near-new performance and reliability for demanding Solio applications.
types.frontDescription: Factory-spec rebuilds using OEM parts and processes, delivering near-new performance and reliability for demanding Solio applications.
types.frontDisclaimer: Limited availability for hybrid K12C and Z12E codes - enquire for lead times.
types.backDescription: Remanufactured Solio engines follow factory specifications with OEM parts, precision machining and rigorous testing. The premium choice for performance, longevity and peace of mind.
backBullets: Best for: Bandit Hybrid, latest MA27S models
types.cta: Compare remanufactured Suzuki Solio engine costs

types.title: Suzuki Solio Refurbished Engines
types.description: Targeted repairs addressing specific failures like timing chains or injectors, offering a middle-ground solution for Solio engines with isolated issues.
types.frontDescription: Targeted repairs addressing specific failures like timing chains or injectors, offering a middle-ground solution for Solio engines with isolated issues.
types.frontDisclaimer: Suitability depends on diagnosed fault - not all engines qualify for refurbishment.
types.backDescription: Refurbished Solio engines focus on repairing known failure points like tensioners, injectors or EGR valves. Cost-effective when the core engine block is sound and only specific components need attention.
backBullets: Includes 6-12 month warranty on repaired components
Best for: Engines with single, diagnosed faults

engineSizes.h2: Suzuki Solio Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every engine displacement fitted to the UK Suzuki Solio is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Suzuki Solio 1.3L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 1.3L D13A turbo diesel powered early European-spec Solio and Wagon R+ models from 2000-2004. Though less common in the UK today, these efficient units remain sought after by import owners and commercial users seeking diesel economy.
compatibleModels: Solio/Delio Wagon R+ MA63S European spec
commonFailurePoints: DPF regeneration issues on later units
items.cta: Get quotes for Suzuki Solio 1.3L diesel engines

items.title: Suzuki Solio 1.0L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.0L K10A powered the earliest first-generation Solio and Wagon R+ models from 1999-2004. Now a niche option for vintage imports, these compact naturally aspirated units are simple to maintain but increasingly rare in the UK market.
commonFailurePoints: Timing belt wear if not serviced
carbon buildup on intake valves at high mileage
items.cta: Compare Suzuki Solio 1.0L petrol engine prices

items.title: Suzuki Solio 1.2L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.2L K12B and K12C engines form the backbone of the UK Suzuki Solio range from 2011-present. The K12B (naturally aspirated) powered 2011-2015 MA15S models, while the K12C Dualjet with SHVS hybrid technology has been fitted to MA26S and MA27S generations since 2015.
commonFailurePoints: oil consumption; K12C: Dualjet injector clogging
items.cta: Compare Suzuki Solio 1.2L petrol engine prices

items.title: Suzuki Solio 1.3L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.3L M13A and G13BB engines appeared in very early Solio and Wagon R+ models from 2003-2007. These larger naturally aspirated units offered more torque than the 1.0L/1.2L options but are now specialist-sourced for vintage imports.
commonFailurePoints: thermostat housing leaks on high-mileage examples
items.cta: Compare Suzuki Solio 1.3L petrol engine prices

groups.title: Suzuki Solio Hybrid / MHEV Engine Sizes

items.title: Suzuki Solio 1.2L Hybrid Engines
items.description: The 1.2L K12C Dualjet with SHVS mild hybrid technology has been the flagship Solio powertrain since 2015. Combining twin injectors per cylinder with a 12V ISG motor and regenerative braking, it delivers improved efficiency without plug-in complexity.
items.cta: Enquire about Suzuki Solio 1.2L hybrid engine availability

items.title: Suzuki Solio 1.2L Three-Cylinder Hybrid Engines
items.description: The latest Z12E 1.2L three-cylinder engine, introduced in the 2025 Solio facelift, represents Suzuki's newest efficiency-focused powertrain. Limited UK availability currently, but specialist sourcing is possible for latest-model imports.
commonFailurePoints: Early production units - limited failure data; monitor for typical three-cylinder NVH characteristics
items.cta: Enquire about Suzuki Solio Z12E engine availability

fuelTypes.intro: Choose your Suzuki Solio engine by fuel type to compare realistic replacement prices, known issues, and compatible UK supply options - from early K10A petrol to the latest K12C SHVS hybrid.

items.title: Suzuki Solio Diesel Engines
items.description: The 1.3L D13A turbo diesel powered early European-spec Solio models (2000-2004) and remains a niche option for import owners seeking diesel economy and torque.
items.descriptor: The 1.3L D13A turbo diesel powered early European-spec Solio models (2000-2004) and remains a niche option for import owners seeking diesel economy and torque.
items.familiesLabel: Common Suzuki Solio Diesel Engine Families
families: D13A - 1.3L turbo diesel (Solio/Delio Wagon R+ MA63S), EGR/DPF compatibility checks essential
foundIn: Solio/Delio Wagon R+ MA63S European spec (2000-2004) - D13A
knownFor: Strong low-end torque for urban driving
EGR valve clogging and turbo actuator wear at higher mileage
Limited UK availability - specialist sourcing recommended

items.title: Suzuki Solio Petrol Engines
items.description: The 1.0L K10A, 1.2L K12B/K12C and 1.3L M13A/G13BB petrol engines have powered every generation of UK Suzuki Solio, with the 1.2L units dominating replacement demand.
items.descriptor: The 1.0L K10A, 1.2L K12B/K12C and 1.3L M13A/G13BB petrol engines have powered every generation of UK Suzuki Solio, with the 1.2L units dominating replacement demand.
items.familiesLabel: Common Suzuki Solio Petrol Engine Families
families: K12B - 1.2L naturally aspirated (MA15S 2011-2015), most common replacement engine
K12C - 1.2L Dualjet (MA26S/MA27S 2015-present), twin injectors per cylinder
K10A - 1.0L early model (MA63S 1999-2004), niche vintage option
foundIn: Solio G, X, Hybrid MA15S (2011-2015) - K12B
Early Solio/Wagon R+ MA63S (1999-2004) - K10A, M13A, G13BB
knownFor: K12B: Reliable but timing chain tensioner wear after 80k miles
K12C: Efficient Dualjet design but injector clogging risk
Simple naturally aspirated design = lower maintenance than turbo alternatives
typicalModels: Solio G, Solio X, Solio Hybrid, Solio Bandit

items.title: Suzuki Solio Mild Hybrid (MHEV) Engines
items.description: The K12C and Z12E engines with SHVS mild hybrid technology have been the flagship Solio powertrains since 2015, combining petrol efficiency with electric assist.
items.descriptor: The K12C and Z12E engines with SHVS mild hybrid technology have been the flagship Solio powertrains since 2015, combining petrol efficiency with electric assist.
families: 12V Integrated Starter Generator (ISG) provides torque assist and regenerative braking
Auto stop-start and coasting functions improve real-world fuel economy
Hybrid system requires specialist calibration during engine replacement
importantNotes: SHVS engine replacement requires ISG motor and 12V battery health checks
ECU adaptation and hybrid system calibration essential post-fit
Availability more limited than standard K12B units - allow extra lead time

engineYears.h2: Suzuki Solio Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This section covers all major engine changes across the Suzuki Solio's production timeline, organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt engine prices from UK specialists.

years.description: The earliest European-spec Solio and Wagon R+ models introduced the D13A diesel and K10A/M13A petrol engines to UK import markets.
keyChanges: First UK availability of Suzuki Solio/Delio Wagon R+ via European imports
D13A turbo diesel option offered alongside K10A 1.0L and M13A 1.3L petrol units
Right-hand drive conversions common for Japanese-spec imports
knownFor: D13A offers strong torque but EGR/DPF issues at high mileage
K10A simple and reliable but underpowered for motorway use
Early imports may need emissions documentation for MOT compliance
years.cta: Get quotes for 2000-2004 Suzuki Solio replacement engines
years.ticker: Suzuki Solio D13A engine replacement • Solio K10A recon engine UK • Wagon R+ diesel engine supply and fit
enquiries: Wagon R+ diesel engine supply and fit

years.description: The all-new MA15S Solio launched in 2011 with the K12B 1.2L petrol engine, becoming the most common replacement engine in the UK Solio range.
keyChanges: New MA15S platform introduced with taller, more practical MPV body style
K12B 1.2L petrol engine replaced older 1.0L/1.3L units across the range
CVT automatic option added alongside 5-speed manual transmission
4WD variants introduced for Japanese domestic market imports
mainEngines: K12B - 1.2L petrol (Solio G, X, Hybrid, Bandit)
popularModels: Suzuki Solio G, Suzuki Solio X, Suzuki Solio Hybrid, Suzuki Solio Bandit
knownFor: K12B reliable but timing chain tensioner wear common after 80k miles
CVT models require correct flexplate/torque converter matching on replacement
Japanese import Solios may need compliance documentation for UK registration
years.cta: Get quotes for 2011-2015 Suzuki Solio replacement engines
years.ticker: Suzuki Solio K12B engine replacement • Solio timing chain tensioner fix • MA15S Solio recon engine UK

years.description: The MA26S Solio introduced the K12C Dualjet engine with SHVS mild hybrid technology, becoming the flagship powertrain for UK import models.
keyChanges: New MA26S platform with improved safety features and hybrid technology
K12C Dualjet engine replaced K12B, adding twin injectors per cylinder
SHVS mild hybrid system with 12V ISG motor and regenerative braking introduced
Bandit sport trim launched with same K12C engine but sportier styling
mainEngines: K12C-B - Revised SHVS hybrid with updated ECU mapping (2018-2020)
popularModels: Suzuki Solio Hybrid, Suzuki Solio Bandit Hybrid, Suzuki Solio G Hybrid
knownFor: K12C Dualjet efficient but injector clogging risk at 60k-90k miles
SHVS system requires specialist diagnostics and calibration on replacement
Hybrid variants command premium pricing due to specialist sourcing
years.cta: Get quotes for 2015-2020 Suzuki Solio replacement engines
years.ticker: Suzuki Solio K12C hybrid engine • Solio SHVS system fault • MA26S Bandit engine replacement

years.description: The latest MA27S Solio continues with the K12C SHVS engine, with the new Z12E three-cylinder hybrid introduced in the 2025 facelift for improved efficiency.
keyChanges: MA27S platform carries over K12C SHVS with minor refinements
2025 facelift introduces Z12E 1.2L three-cylinder hybrid engine
Enhanced safety tech and connectivity features across the range
Continued strong demand for Japanese import Solios in the UK market
popularModels: Suzuki Solio Hybrid MA27S, Suzuki Solio Bandit Hybrid (latest)
knownFor: K12C remains reliable with proper maintenance; monitor injector health
Z12E early production - limited failure data but monitor NVH characteristics
Latest models benefit from improved hybrid system calibration and efficiency
years.cta: Get quotes for 2020-present Suzuki Solio replacement engines
years.ticker: Suzuki Solio MA27S engine • Solio Z12E three-cylinder hybrid • Latest Solio recon engine UK

faq.h2: Suzuki Solio Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does a Suzuki Solio engine replacement cost in the UK?
items.answer: A rebuilt Suzuki Solio engine typically costs £895-£1,850 supply-only, depending on engine code and condition. Fitment adds £400-£750 depending on location and specialist rates.
keyPoints: K12B petrol rebuilt: £895-£1,450 supply only
K12C hybrid rebuilt: £1,150-£1,850 supply only
Fitment costs vary by garage location and engine complexity
All rebuilt engines include 12-month unlimited mileage warranty
items.cta: Compare rebuilt Suzuki Solio engine prices for your variant

items.question: What engine codes fit my Suzuki Solio?
items.answer: The most common Suzuki Solio engine codes are K12B (2011-2015 petrol), K12C (2015+ hybrid), and D13A (2000-2004 diesel). Match your chassis code (MA15S/MA26S/MA27S) for compatibility.
keyPoints: MA63S European (2000-2004): D13A diesel
Always verify engine code via VIN plate or service book
items.cta: Check Suzuki Solio engine code compatibility for your chassis

items.question: Is a reconditioned Suzuki Solio engine reliable?
items.answer: Yes - reconditioned Suzuki Solio engines from vetted UK specialists are thoroughly inspected, cleaned and resealed with worn components replaced, backed by a 12-month unlimited mileage warranty.
keyPoints: Reconditioned units undergo cleaning, inspection and resealing
Worn gaskets, seals and bearings are replaced as standard
12-month unlimited mileage warranty included on all units
Ideal for budget-conscious owners seeking reliable performance
items.cta: View reconditioned Suzuki Solio engine options with warranty

items.question: What is the difference between K12B and K12C Solio engines?
items.answer: The K12C adds Dualjet twin-injector technology and SHVS mild hybrid capability versus the simpler K12B, improving efficiency but requiring specialist servicing and calibration.
keyPoints: K12B: Simple 1.2L naturally aspirated petrol, 91hp
K12C: Dualjet twin injectors + SHVS hybrid assist, same 91hp
K12C requires hybrid system calibration on replacement
K12C commands higher pricing due to specialist components
items.cta: Compare K12B vs K12C Suzuki Solio engine prices and options

items.question: Can I replace my Solio petrol engine with a hybrid K12C?
items.answer: Technically possible but not recommended - hybrid conversion requires ECU reprogramming, ISG motor integration, battery management system and specialist calibration, often exceeding replacement cost.
keyPoints: Hybrid conversion requires extensive electrical and ECU modifications
SHVS system calibration needs Suzuki diagnostic tools
Cost of conversion often exceeds buying a hybrid-spec Solio
Stick with like-for-like engine code for reliable, warranty-backed replacement
items.cta: Get quotes for like-for-like Suzuki Solio engine replacement

items.question: How long does Suzuki Solio engine replacement take?
items.answer: Supply-only engines typically dispatch in 3-5 working days. Full supply & fit service takes 2-3 days including delivery, fitting, calibration and road testing at a UK specialist garage.
keyPoints: Supply-only: 3-5 working days dispatch from order confirmation
Supply & fit: 2-3 days total including fitting and calibration
Hybrid engines may require extra time for SHVS system calibration
Nationwide delivery available on all engine types
items.cta: Book Suzuki Solio engine supply & fit with guaranteed timeslot

items.question: Will a used Suzuki Solio engine pass MOT emissions?
items.answer: Yes - used Suzuki Solio engines supplied through EngineMarket include emissions documentation and are pre-tested to ensure MOT compliance for UK registration.
keyPoints: All engines include emissions test documentation where required
Pre-tested to ensure compliance with UK MOT standards
Japanese import engines verified for UK specification compatibility
Confirm exact requirements with your chosen specialist pre-purchase
items.cta: Check used Suzuki Solio engine MOT compliance before purchase

items.question: How do I find my Suzuki Solio engine code?
items.answer: Find your Suzuki Solio engine code on the VIN plate near the firewall, in your service book, or via an OBD2 scanner reading the ECU - essential for ordering the correct replacement.
keyPoints: VIN plate location: near firewall or driver's door pillar
Service book lists engine code on first page or maintenance records
OBD2 scanner can read ECU-stored engine code information
Enter registration on EngineMarket for instant code verification
items.cta: Find your Suzuki Solio engine code with our free lookup tool

items.question: Can I fit a Suzuki Solio engine myself?
items.answer: Professional fitting is strongly recommended - Suzuki Solio engine swaps require ECU relearn procedures, hybrid system calibration (if applicable) and specialist tools for safe, warranty-valid installation.
keyPoints: ECU adaptation required post-fit for proper engine management
Hybrid K12C/Z12E engines need SHVS system calibration
Specialist tools needed for timing chain and hybrid component work
DIY fitting may void warranty and risk improper installation
items.cta: Find a vetted Suzuki Solio engine specialist near you

items.question: What warranty comes with Suzuki Solio replacement engines?
items.answer: Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty, with some rebuilt and remanufactured units offering extended 24-month coverage options.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty on all engine types
Rebuilt and remanufactured units may include 24-month options
Warranty covers parts and labour at any UK specialist garage
Always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier pre-purchase
items.cta: Compare Suzuki Solio engine warranty options from UK specialists
